rationale: Add constructs to exercise VCS/zip sources, nested context merges, list literals, varied hook outcomes, and raw boolean strings.

updates.replacement:
extra_context_object
    : '{}'
    | '{' extra_context_pair (',' extra_context_pair)* '}'
    ;

extra_context_pair
    : STRING ':' json_value
    ;

json_value
    : json_bool
    | STRING
    | json_object
    | json_array
    ;

json_object
    : '{' (STRING ':' json_value (',' STRING ':' json_value)*)? '}'
    ;

json_array
    : '[' (json_value (',' json_value)*)? ']'
    ;

hook_script
    : 'null'
    | '"from pathlib import Path\\nPath(\'HOOK_OK\').write_text(\'ok\', encoding=\'utf-8\')\\n"'
    | '"raise SystemExit(1)\\n"'
    | '"print(\'hook succeeded\')\\n"'
    | '"raise RuntimeError(\'hook failure\')\\n"'
    ;
